scope.description: QA-only Plex indexing/metadata reconciliation plan for the same 8 Movies section 5 / hybrid_movies_live sample.

working_hypothesis.summary: Plex metadata/indexing/cache visibility is the leading actionable issue for the 8-path sample. Files exist from user context and WebDAV/Plex endpoints respond, but Plex does not surface strict title/year metadata rows or expected ScarFLIX_part paths.

read_only_confirmation_steps: Re-read plex_metadata_vs_webdav_map_comparison_results.json and confirm 0/8 expected part matches.
Re-read materialized_qa_timing_probe_results.json and confirm no WebDAV/Plex timeout regression.
Repeat the same 8-path metadata comparison only after review approval.
Read Plex scanner logs for the locked sample names and part hashes only after review approval.

proposed_actions.description: Ask Plex to refresh only D:\StremioCatalog\_Hybrid\Movies\_ScarFLIXLive\06 Discover Movies if Plex accepts the path parameter.
proposed_actions.rollback: No filesystem change. Stop after one request and escalate if Plex ignores path scoping or causes unexpected churn.
proposed_actions.success_check: After settle window, same-sample comparison improves toward strict expected part matches.

proposed_actions.description: Ask Plex to refresh Movies section 5 once if path-scoped refresh is unsupported or inconclusive.
proposed_actions.rollback: No repeated scans. Stop after one request; no cleanup or database/cache mutation.
proposed_actions.success_check: After settle window, same-sample comparison reaches at least 6/8 strict expected part matches.

proposed_actions.description: Refresh specific Plex rating keys only if future read-only comparison finds strict title/year rows with stale or missing part paths.
proposed_actions.rollback: Do not run unless strict rating keys exist; stop if wrong-title risk appears.
proposed_actions.success_check: Specific rating key part paths converge to expected ScarFLIX_part paths.

proposed_actions.description: Rerun run_plex_metadata_vs_webdav_map_comparison against the same locked 8-path sample only.
proposed_actions.success_check: At least 6/8 strict expected part matches, zero wrong-title matches.

success_criteria: Process launch health does not enter degraded mode.
Same-sample comparison improves from 0/8 to at least 6/8 strict expected ScarFLIX_part matches.
Zero newly visible legacy/direct resolver rows.
No publication, expansion, cleanup, deletion, path rewrite, or source mutation occurs.
stop_conditions: Unexpected Plex authentication or permission failure.
Path-scoped refresh triggers broad unexpected scan churn.
Wrong-title or legacy direct resolver evidence appears.
Any next step requires destructive cleanup, database/cache mutation, source quarantine, path rewrite, or publication.
next_required_step: Grok peer review before any execution.
